name: stockflow
description: Inventory app captured end-to-end on v0.3.0-beta.14: F1 record-stock visibility, then F6 split tracking-code (expand/contract column drop). Two-sprint run through deploy + promote + merge; the aggregate-isolation canon prevents the whole-table-aggregate contamination at design time (a clean prevention-path corpus, no runtime self-heal).

features.summary: additive: record-stock form + stock-by-location home table + sku detail view
contract: split tracking_code into batch_number + serial_number, then drop the old column in lockstep
